metadata.title: Cut LLM costs by up to 40%. One endpoint swap.
metadata.description: GateCtr compresses every prompt, routes to the cheapest model, and blocks requests before they exceed your budget. No code changes.
metadata.ogTitle: GateCtr — Cut LLM costs by up to 40%.
metadata.ogDescription: Compress prompts, route to the cheapest model, enforce budgets. One endpoint swap. No code changes.

hero.badge: AI Cost Infrastructure · Zero code changes
hero.headline: Cut LLM costs by up to 40%.
hero.description: Compresses every prompt, routes to the cheapest model, and blocks requests before they exceed your budget. No code changes.
hero.trust: Your API key goes directly to OpenAI. GateCtr never touches your billing.

logos.label: Works with every major LLM provider

problem.label: The problem
problem.headline: LLM costs are unpredictable. Until now.
problem.description: Every API call is a black box. No visibility, no control, no alerts. Until the invoice arrives.

items.label: Unexpected monthly invoice
items.description: One agent loop. No cap. Full bill.

items.label: Tokens wasted on bloated prompts
items.description: Context you don't need. Tokens you still pay for.

items.label: Visibility on what's happening
items.description: No dashboard. No alerts. No audit trail.

features.label: Core features
features.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.description: Six features. One endpoint swap. Full control.

items.title: Budget Firewall
items.description: Hard caps. Soft alerts. No surprise invoices.
items.detail: Set a cap. Hit it → request blocked → $0 cost incurred. Every time.

items.title: Context Optimizer
items.description: Compresses your prompts. {tokenReduction} tokens. Same output.
items.detail: Saves an average of 312 tokens per request. Measured on every call.

items.title: Model Router
items.description: Picks the right LLM for each request automatically.
items.detail: Always use the cheapest model that gets the job done. Automatically.

items.title: Usage Dashboard
items.detail: See exactly where your money goes. Per request, per project, per model.

items.title: Webhooks Engine
items.description: Push events to Slack, Teams, or any URL.
items.detail: Budget alerts, usage reports, anomaly detection — wherever your team lives.

items.title: RBAC & Audit Logs
items.description: Owner, Admin, Member, Viewer. {auditDays} days history.
items.detail: Role-based access for teams. Full audit trail. Compliance-ready.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.headline: One swap. Full control.
howItWorks.description: No SDK lock-in. No architecture changes. Just swap the endpoint.

steps.title: Swap your endpoint
steps.description: Replace your LLM provider URL with GateCtr. Keep your existing API keys.

steps.title: GateCtr takes control
steps.description: Every request is optimized, routed, and measured automatically.

steps.title: You save. You see everything.
steps.description: Real-time dashboard. Budget alerts. {tokenReduction} token cost from day one.

howItWorks.demoCta: Try it in 30s — paste your prompt, see the savings

codePreview.label: Integration
codePreview.headline: Up and running in 5 min.
codePreview.description: Node.js, Python, cURL, or drop-in with your existing OpenAI client. Zero architecture changes.
codePreview.calloutPython: pip install {sdkPip} · same API, same output
codePreview.calloutCurl: No SDK required · any HTTP client works
codePreview.calloutDropin: One line change · your existing code stays intact
codePreview.calloutAdvanced: budget + optimizer + router — Pro plan features

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.headline: Pay for control. Not for tokens.
pricing.description: You pay your LLM provider directly. GateCtr charges for the value on top — optimization, routing, analytics.
pricing.roiAnchor: Pro at $29/mo. Average token savings: $80–120/mo. ROI positive from day one.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For devs spending $50+/mo on LLM calls.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: For teams where AI costs are becoming a line item.
features: Team roles — Owner, Admin, Member, Viewer

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For organizations with compliance and scale requirements.

finalCta.headline: Your LLM bill is higher than it needs to be.
finalCta.description: Free plan. No credit card. Up and running in {setupTime}.
finalCta.trust: No credit card required · Cancel anytime
